name: Argo Global Listed Infrastructure Limited
analysis: ALI has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$2.4550. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
